summary: Tested BUG FIX: Wallet balance update after deposit. The fix is WORKING CORRECTLY. Backend now updates both users.balance and bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance. Frontend calls onBalanceChange callback after successful deposit to refresh wallet display.

deposit_api.details: POST /api/deposit-offers/deposit correctly credits amount + bonus to bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance

wallet_balance_update.details: Before deposit: €344.00, After €10 deposit with 5% bonus: €354.50. Balance correctly updated in database.

frontend_balance_display.details: Wallet page at /wallet shows updated balance €354.50 after deposit

onBalanceChange_callback.details: DepositOffers.js calls onBalanceChange() after successful deposit (line 292-294), BidBlitzPay.jsx passes fetchWallet as callback (line 2051)

backend/routers/deposit_offers.py.lines_264-293: PASS - Updates both users.balance/bidblitz_balance AND bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance

frontend/src/pages/DepositOffers.js.lines_287-294: PASS - Calls refreshUser() and onBalanceChange() after successful deposit

frontend/src/pages/BidBlitzPay.jsx.line_2051: PASS - Passes fetchWallet as onBalanceChange prop to DepositOffers

seed_data_creation: Created test deposit: €10 with Starter Bonus (5%) = €10.50 credited
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wallet balance update bug is FIXED. The issue was that backend only updated users.balance but frontend displays bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance. Fix: Backend now updates both collections, and frontend calls fetchWallet() via onBalanceChange callback after deposit. Test user kunde@bidblitz.ae now has €354.50 balance (was €344.00 before test deposit).

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend deposit endpoint only updated users.balance collection, but frontend wallet display reads from bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance collection
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: 1. Backend now updates both users.balance AND bidblitz_wallets.universal_balance in deposit_offers.py lines 264-293. 2. Frontend DepositOffers.js now accepts onBalanceChange callback and calls it after successful deposit. 3. BidBlitzPay.jsx passes fetchWallet as onBalanceChange prop.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested via API: Before deposit €344.00, After €10+5% bonus deposit €354.50. UI correctly shows updated balance.
